item.title: What Happened to 26‑Year‑Old Cynthia Martinez Perez?
item.description: In July 2017, Cynthia Martinez Perez vanished after leaving a bar in Keizer, Oregon with two men. Despite years of searching, her family is still fighting for answers as investigators continue to focus on a key person of interest and the events of that night. What crucial detail could finally break this case open?

media:content.media:title: What Happened to 26‑Year‑Old Cynthia Martinez Perez?
media:content.media:description: In July 2017, Cynthia Martinez Perez vanished after leaving a bar in Keizer, Oregon with two men. Despite years of searching, her family is still fighting for answers as investigators continue to focus on a key person of interest and the events of that night. What crucial detail could finally break this case open?

item.title: Stepmom’s Chilling Threat Ended in a Shocking Arrest — The Rocío Wanninkhof Case Part One

item.title: I Don’t Think It Was an Accident… Melissa Planned This

item.title: Mother Leaves Baby Alone for 10 Days to Go on Vacation!

item.title: Sunday School Teacher Did the Unthinkable
item.description: A trusted figure turned predator. How did a Sunday school teacher betray the innocence of a little girl, and what followed in the investigation?
